About.title: Built on Trust.
About.subtitle: Ready to build?
About.description: Our team is ready to deliver excellence.
About.summary: From ground-breaking to ribbon-cutting, SHPETIMI-R Construction delivers structural integrity and timeless craftsmanship across residential construction, commercial, and industrial projects in Kosovo. Our team handles every stage of your building project.
About.missionText: Deliver structures that outlive trends — built with precision and purpose on every project.

Office.title: Visit Us
Office.description: We believe the best building projects in Kosovo start with a <highlight>face-to-face conversation</highlight>. Visit our office and let's sit down to discuss your residential or commercial vision.
